title: Separate Layers
prompt: Distinguish word origin, concept origin, practice origin, institutional reception, and modern formalization.

title: Honor Without Myth
prompt: Credit al-Khwārizmī precisely without claiming he invented every algorithm.

title: Analogy, Not Identity
prompt: Use modern comparisons only when differences remain visible.

title: Networks Make Memory
prompt: Include translators, scribes, teachers, users, institutions, and tools.
